title: NYC Sidewalk Shed Permit Activity | Weekly DOB Brief
description: Track selected NYC sidewalk shed permit activity by ZIP, borough, issued date, permit ID, filing number, source link, and cost bucket.
h1: NYC sidewalk shed permit activity by ZIP and issued date.
lede: The weekly brief filters NYC DOB NOW public records for selected sidewalk shed activity, then packages the result into a CSV preview and a short source-linked brief.
audience: Scaffold firms, sidewalk shed vendors, site-service providers, and suppliers that watch where exterior work is starting.
currentSample: The first issue sample includes 37 sidewalk shed rows from the 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-08 public-record pull.
useCase: Use the brief to spot fresh sidewalk shed permit activity in selected NYC ZIP codes before spending time in DOB search screens. It is meant for weekly territory review, not automated bidding or guaranteed sales.
sampleLine: Sidewalk Shed | ZIP and borough | issued date | status | cost bucket | DOB NOW source link
